zh.lifeSummary: 當Randol Woodward於1286年出生在英國英格蘭爾沙文頓 姆 格雷斯迪時，他的父親William Woodnett29歲，母親Mrs. William Woodnett24歲。他於大約1315年與Sibylla De Audlem在英國英格蘭爾沙文頓 姆 格雷斯迪結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1365年在他的家鄉享年79歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Randol Woodward于1286年出生在英国英格兰爾沙文頓 姆 格雷斯迪时，他的父亲William Woodnett29岁，母亲Mrs. William Woodnett24岁。他于大约1315年与Sibylla De Audlem在英国英格兰爾沙文頓 姆 格雷斯迪结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1365年在他的家乡享年79岁。

nameMeanings.name: Woodward
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name for a forester employed to look after the trees and game in a forest, Middle English woodward (from Old English wudu ‘wood’ + weard ‘guardian, protector’).

History: Henry Woodward emigrated from England in 1635 and settled first in Dorchester, MA, and subsequently in Northampton, MA. He had many prominent descendants. Another Henry Woodward, born c. 1646 in the British West Indies, was the first English settler in SC (1664).

variants.name: Woodard
meanings: from the Norman Old French personal name Odard, Udard, Middle English Wodard, Wudard. It derives from the ancient Germanic name Authard, Othard, Odard, composed of the elements aud- ‘riches' + hard- ‘hard, bold’.
occupational name from Middle English wode ‘wood’ + herde ‘herd’ (Old English wudu + hierde), for a person who tended animals pastured in woodland.

variants.name: Woodworth
meanings: English (Lancashire): variant of Woodward or Wadworth, the latter being a habitational name from Wadworth in Yorkshire, which is derived from the Old English personal name Wada, Wadda + Old English worth ‘enclosure’.

variants.name: Woodman
meanings: occupational name for a woodcutter or a forester (compare Woodward ), from Middle English wodeman ‘woodman’. In some instances this may be a variant of Wadman .
from the Middle English personal name Wudemann (Old English Wuduman, from wudu ‘wood’ + mann ‘man’).

nameMeanings.name: Randol
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman given name, Old Norse Rannulfr, derived from rand ‘rim, shield’ (or hrafn ‘raven’) + úlfr ‘wolf’.

variants.name: Randulf
meanings: From a Norman given name, Old Norse Rannulfr, derived from rand ‘rim, shield’ (or hrafn ‘raven’) + úlfr ‘wolf’.

variants.name: Randolph
meanings: Properly Radolph, the same as the German names Radulph, Radolf, Hroadolf, RudoIph; from Old German rad-ulph, help or counsel. The nickname is Rann.

en.lifeSummary: When Randol Woodward was born in 1286, in Shavington cum Gresty, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, William Woodnett, was 29 and his mother, Mrs. William Woodnett, was 24. He married Sibylla De Audlem about 1315, in Shavington cum Gresty, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He died in 1365, in his hometown, at the age of 79.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Randol Woodward est né en 1286, à Shavington cum Gresty, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William Woodnett, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Mrs. William Woodnett, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Sibylla De Audlem environ 1315, à Shavington cum Gresty, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1365, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 79 ans.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Randol Woodward è nato il nel 1286 nel Shavington cum Gresty, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, William Woodnett, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Mrs. William Woodnett, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Sibylla De Audlem circa 1315, nel Shavington cum Gresty, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1365, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 79 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Randol Woodward(이)가 1286년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 샤빙턴 c 그레스티에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Woodnett(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs. William Woodnett(은)는 24세였다. 그는 대략 1315년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 샤빙턴 c 그레스티에서 Sibylla De Audlem(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1365년 그의 고향에서 79세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ele casou-se com Sibylla De Audlem aproximadamente 1315, em Shavington cum Gresty, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Randol Woodward родился в 1286 г. в местности шавингтон кум грести, чешир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William Woodnett было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs. William Woodnett, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Sibylla De Audlem около 1315 г. в местности шавингтон кум грести, чешир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1365 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 79 лет.
